strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: Sheena, give me a little help here?
strings.panel.p2.bubble.right.html: Not my job.I'm strictly a non-player character.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: Look kid, I'm a very limited sprite. I can't move at all, so I just hafta stay put.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: You know, some guys would consider you an ideal girlfriend.
